expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the case focus: "Benchmark focus: Developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" and states "README.md output contract states Phase 7 produces: `developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` ... derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" plus "`finalPlanSummary.mjs` implements the derivation logic ... tagged `<P1>` OR ... contains `[ANALOG-GATE]`".

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md section "Phase 7 responsibilities explicitly cover the Phase 7 deliverables (alignment)" lists Phase 7 actions/outputs (promote to `qa_plan_final.md`, finalization record, generate summaries via `finalPlanSummary.mjs`, explicit user approval) and concludes: "This matches the benchmark requirement 'Output aligns with primary phase phase7'".
